name: vaybel
description: Vaybel skills: code-on-MCP workflows for turning apparel ideas into designs and flat mockups.

vaybel_pat.title: Vaybel PAT
vaybel_pat.description: Optional fallback PAT. Recommended setup is to define VAYBEL_PAT once in Claude Code settings and reuse it for MCP and skills.

mcp_url.title: Vaybel MCP URL
mcp_url.description: MCP server URL. Keep the default unless you are testing a local or staging server.

app_url.title: Vaybel App URL
app_url.description: Base Vaybel app URL used for dashboard links.
